I will not suffer fools, I will not suffer liars, and I will not suffer dishonorable strippers. Erika would have enough legal sense to know that if she boo-hoo cried and asked us to end a deposition, and then we subsequently signed an agreement for confidentiality to hide her boo-hoo breakdown from the public, it would be a bad idea for her to then violate the confidentiality which really only benefited her! 

You see the beauty of being me is I love allowing the public in. I have nothing to hide and I intended to honor keeping mum about the emotional breakdown you had.

No, Kimberly. What actually happened was you broke down crying during the deposition once my lawyer asked you a direct question about a drug dealer. You didn’t expect us to have the drug dealer’s name and number after we asked you about cocaine usage but we had both, because my source was another stripper. 
You then cried, and apologized to my face, and moved to dismissed mid-deposition. And in case you woke up wanting to try me this morning, you should know there’s a remaining transcript and vi

Jordan Peterson once said “you cannot twist the fabric of reality without it snapping back”. Though his words were not shared in the context of today’s current events, they ought to be recalled as we examine the objective failure of this administration’s disastrous decision to attack Iran.

Over the last three years especially, we have watched Zionists bend the fabric of reality; They have purchased views, influencers and journalists. They have activated millions of online bots. They even went s

If they come for Tucker, we ride at dawn. 
Really nothing else to say here. 

We’re not doing the gulags 2.0 with these Bolshevik descendants.


Tucker Carlson (@TuckerCarlson)

DD Geopolitics (@DD_Geopolitics)

🇺🇸🇮🇶 A suicide drone has struck the U.S. Embassy compound in Baghdad, targeting a Marine Corps sniper position and a surveillance radar. Smoke columns are rising from the heart of the compound.

This is the most fortified American diplomatic facility in the country, inside the Green Zone.

Video
  



Video

Somehow this isn’t making a splash in the American news cycle.
The White House too busy preparing a Mortal Kombat war meme?
Maybe their dumb asses should have gone to Congress? Or listened to Charlie Kirk rather than crackhead Zionists and their messianic red heifers?


Sky News (@SkyNews)

There is a cover up afoot regarding the health of Bibi Netanyahu. 

The United States government should be addressing this head on but there is a directive to stay mum. 

What’s going on? Haven’t they lied enough?

This tweet represents the end of the 6 month neocon attempt to hijack Charlie’s legacy. 
They fought with money, we fought with truth. 

We won.


Bret Weinstein (@BretWeinstein)

On June 18th, I had a text exchange with Charlie Kirk. He said he was spending two full days at the White House trying to persuade President Trump not to initiate a war with Iran.

Given that Charlie was close with the President and that he represented a large constituency essential to Trump, and given that many propon

I don’t know that Bibi is dead but it is very evident there is real panic at the White House and this war is not going as planned. 
And with the way Trump casually lied about bombing the school girls, it’s hard to trust anything coming from this admin.


ELIZABETH LANE (@imelizabethlane)

The Israeli PM’s office says the assassination in the Iranian strike is fake news. They told this to Anadolu, but they failed to present Bibi’s recent location, a video, or anything else. 

We can wait until Bi

Everyone who knew Charlie at all knows the story about how Ben operated behind the scenes to corrupt Charlie’s rise. Up until the end, he put pressure on TPUSA via Jewish donors.
Then Charlie dies and the imp shows up like it’s an episode of Storage Wars? 

NOPE.


MILO (@Nero)

Ben Shapiro began to secretly commission hit jobs on TPUSA a decade ago. Charlie Kirk knew. We met and talked about it and discussed strategy. Kirk and I weren’t friends for long, but while we were, all he talked about w
Pretending Charlie was friends with Ben Shapiro and filthy neocons like you simply won’t be happening on my watch.

🔥




Meghan McCain (@MeghanMcCain)

Stop sharing dead people’s text messages - you absolute psychopaths.



— https://nitter.net/MeghanMcCain/status/2032816698760241322#m
